context_for_next_testing_agent: Unknown Transaction Classification System fully tested. All 10 endpoints working correctly. Test user (mobiletest@test.com) has 0 unknown transactions, so classification features return empty results but with correct API structure.

GET /api/custody/classify/analyze.notes: Returns unknown_count=0, empty patterns, by_confidence with auto_apply/suggest/unresolved arrays, metrics

POST /api/custody/classify/auto-apply.notes: Both dry_run=true and dry_run=false work correctly, returns classified_count=0 with appropriate message

GET /api/custody/classify/metrics.notes: Returns current_unknown, period_days, auto_classification_rate, suggestion_accuracy, daily_stats

GET /api/custody/classify/patterns.notes: Returns empty patterns array (no unknown transactions to detect patterns from)

POST /api/custody/classify/by-pattern.notes: Returns pattern not found error for nonexistent patterns, validates required fields

POST /api/custody/classify/by-destinatio.notes: Returns classified_count=0 for nonexistent destinations, validates required fields

POST /api/custody/classify/decide.notes: Feedback loop endpoint - returns transaction not found for nonexistent tx_ids

GET /api/custody/classify/batches.notes: Returns empty batches array (no classifications have been made)
